description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests - EVM that runs on workflow dispatch, push to feature/evm branch or tags containing evm, and pull requests to feature/evm. The workflow should have a job to build binaries on ubuntu-latest, then another job to run node RPC tests that depends on the first job, downloads the binaries, performs chores, runs defid node, pushes fixtures, sets up Go, checks out go-ethlibs, and runs EVM RPC tests.
